final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing panoramic scroll artwork of the Tang Dynasty Chang'an Lantern Festival.

Style/medium: needs a "工笔重彩" (gongbi zhongcai / meticulous brushwork with heavy colors) aesthetic — exact brush technique and pigment layering is yours
Composition: must be a long scroll format panoramic view
Subject: must include tens of thousands of lanterns illuminating the night sky
Scene/backdrop: must be Tang Dynasty Chang'an city during Lantern Festival
Lighting/mood: needs a festive night atmosphere with lantern glow — exact light distribution is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve the historical Tang Dynasty setting and lantern festival context
Avoid:
